Alright I just got back from Washington lost city and let me say that was about maybe I'd say about 20 of us maybe 30 of us that was definitely a lot of people that an normally husband oh I had a people wanted to go and see this and I highly recommend that I have nothing bad to say about this movie I enjoyed it I laughed I lileft I laughed so much I was crying great action movie lots of comedy I'm the comedy Sandra Bullock as beautiful as ever I'm just saying here that this this movie is highly recommended I'm recommended I enjoyed everything about it it's a great date movie if you I wasn't on a date but I was a great date movie I was I love lots of action great movie great chemistry everything everything about this movie was actually on I git was excellent I give it 13 skulls out of 13 skulls definitely worth watching Can't find a thing wrong with the movie here I enjoyed every bit of it and I would love to see a sequel as you know So I highly recommend for you to go see this movie
